unit.note: Client vitest 202 files / 1969 tests green (finalize F0 gate). Server vitest 161 files / 1887 tests also green (SHIPWRIGHT_NETWORK_PROFILE=local), unaffected. D05 changes are Playwright e2e specs (not vitest), so the unit suites are unchanged; F0 confirms no regression. tsc --noEmit clean (the playwright config change typechecks).

integration.note: No new vitest integration. The cross-instance schema-migration behavior (v1->v4 write-on-touch + projectId backfill; PATCH v4 preservation) is exercised by the two Playwright e2e guards, recorded under e2e.

e2e.note: Specs 62 (v1->v4 migration on write-on-touch) + 70-g (v4 persistence on PATCH), both ADR-038 guards, proven GREEN in the build phase under the sentinel-gated schema-isolated Playwright project (SHIPWRIGHT_E2E_ISOLATED=1, temp USERPROFILE under os.tmpdir()) by a separate verifier (author!=fixer). RED-first demonstrated: 62 red when the v1->v4 backfill is broken (rows dropped); 70-g red when the on-disk schema version is tampered. testIgnored from the default desktop project + collected only under the sentinel-only schema-isolated project, so NOT re-executed in this finalize-only run; the real store sha256 f0610675 was byte-unchanged throughout.

surface_verification.justification: Test-repair iterate: only Playwright e2e specs (62 schema-migration, 70-g schema-persistence), the isolated-store helper, and playwright config changed — no server/client production code. The two schema specs are testIgnored from the default Playwright project and collected only under the sentinel-gated schema-isolated project (SHIPWRIGHT_E2E_ISOLATED=1 against a temp home under os.tmpdir()), so no browser can drive them on the default stack without the isolated sentinel. Correctness is proven by the independent verifier's isolated green run plus RED-first proofs (62 RED when the v1->v4 backfill is broken, 70-g RED when the on-disk schema version is tampered); the real store sha256 was byte-unchanged throughout. No production surface changed, so there is no startable user-experienceable surface.

behaviors.behavior: AC1 - the two ADR-038 schema guards no longer reproduce their failures (70-g permanently red on schemaVersion===2; 62 vacuous via wrong registry path)
behaviors.evidence: Both specs GREEN on the isolated temp-home schema-isolated stack (build phase, verifier author!=fixer): 62 asserts v1 rows load as projectId=unassigned + on-disk upgrades to v4; 70-g asserts PATCH keeps schemaVersion 4 + preserves every row's projectId.

behaviors.behavior: AC2 - a NEW regression proof is RED on the pre-fix path and GREEN after
behaviors.evidence: RED-first: 62 goes red when the v1->v4 backfill is deliberately broken (rows dropped); 70-g goes red when the on-disk schema version is tampered. Recorded by the independent verifier.

behaviors.behavior: AC3 - full server + client suites stay green (no invariant/ADR regressed)
behaviors.evidence: F0: server vitest 1887/1887 (SHIPWRIGHT_NETWORK_PROFILE=local), client vitest 1969/1969, tsc --noEmit clean.

behaviors.behavior: AC4 - files stay within footprint; bloat baseline not ratcheted
behaviors.evidence: Diff = 2 specs + isolated-store.ts helper + 2 playwright config files (documented deliberate footprint deviation for the safe isolated repair). shipwright_bloat_baseline.json unchanged (no ratchet).

behaviors.behavior: AC5 (MAX) - every hardening gate passes: author!=fixer guard, RED-first, doubt-reviewer + external_review, isolation audit + real-store safety
behaviors.evidence: Isolation self-lock aborts (writeAttempted=[]) when SHIPWRIGHT_E2E_ISOLATED!=1 or store outside os.tmpdir(); doubt-reviewer closed junction/realpath, partial-prefix, walk-up, case, trailing-sep, write-before-gate + the TEMP=%USERPROFILE% residual (sentinel); external_review high/medium findings applied (hard projectId asserts, both-cards assert, sentinel), seedV1Store unlocked-write accepted-with-rationale (single-writer isolated stack). Real store sha256 f0610675 byte-unchanged.
